title: Regression: orchestrator retry under apply failure
task: Ensure the orchestrator correctly retries patch generation when the initial patch fails to apply, and that each retry incorporates feedback from the previous attempt.
audience: Maintainers validating orchestrator retry logic after changes to pipeline.ts
constraints: Retry count must not exceed maxAttempts from config
Each retry prompt must include rejection feedback from the previous attempt
Memory service must record failures on non-recoverable errors
successCriteria: lastApplyRejects from attempt N is present in the feedback for attempt N+1
finalDecision reflects the outcome of the last attempt
No infinite loop: pipeline terminates within maxAttempts iterations
nonGoals: Does not test the quality of patch generation
Does not assert specific patch content
risks: Mock adapter timing may differ from real adapter behavior
Config changes to maxAttempts could invalidate test assumptions
